title: Contentified
description: A mod all about adding new content to enhance the Minecraft experience!
body:
# 🧱 Contentified
Contentified is a Minecraft mod focused on enriching your gameplay with vanilla-friendly content that blends seamlessly with the base game. Whether you're an adventurer, builder, or survival enthusiast, Contentified enhances your experience without breaking the core aesthetic or mechanics of Minecraft.

## 📺 Trailer
Take a look at the trailer to see what this mod's all about!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/I9flGVkm7cA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 🎯 Features
- Adds gameplay enhancements that feel right at home in vanilla Minecraft.
- Designed to be lightweight, intuitive, and fully compatible with other vanilla-style mods.
- Built for Minecraft 1.21.11 using the Fabric modloader.

## 👤 Authors
- SoulSandMan - Owner/Main Developer
- 7410 - Additional Help
- FrozenBlock Modding Oasis - Pottery Sherd Help
- cooliornguy - Playtester
- ThickFrenchFry47 - Playtester/Additional Models, Textures, and Sounds
- SqueakyRabbit04 - Playtester
- Homogons - Playtester
- VoidRBX - Playtester
- The Excavator Man - Playtester
- Mr. Sasha - Playtester
- PixelGuy - Playtester
- DarkSky - Playtester/Suggested extended Endorium Armor functionalities
- VanillaTweaks - Pixel-consistent textures
- Faithful - Pixel-consistent Ghasts, Happy Ghasts, Slimes, Magma Cubes, Sonic Boom

## 🔧 Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Java 21 or higher
- Fabric API
